rows.label: tev022701_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire

rows.label: tev022701_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask Lucy about Armory Alley.

rows.label: tev022701_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss

rows.label: tev022701_SEL0021
rows.name:
Ask Lucy if she's heard
any interesting rumors.

rows.label: tev022701_SEL0031
rows.name:
Ask Lucy if you can
pilot a Doll right now.

rows.label: tev022701_SEL0051
rows.name: Ask Lucy about Growth weaponry.

rows.label: tev022701_SEL0071
rows.name:
Ask Lucy about the special
properties of Dolls.

rows.label: tev022701_SEL0091
rows.name: Ask Lucy about Growth weaponry.

rows.label: tev022701_SEL1021
rows.name:
Ask Lucy if she has
any interesting news.

rows.label: tev022701_SEL0111
rows.name: Ask Lucy about the Prog Ares.

rows.label: tev022701_SEL3021
rows.name: Ask Lucy about recent developments.

rows.label: tev022701_MSG0001
rows.name:
Have you been to Armory Alley in
the administrative district?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022701_MSG0002
rows.name:
You can buy ground gear from a
variety of manufacturers down there.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022701_MSG0003
rows.name:
Heck, you could even purchase a
brand-new Doll from Sakuraba
Industries if you had the credits![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022701_MSG0004
rows.name:
You can also buy equipment that I helped
design! Although I can't tell you what,
because it's all covered under an NDA.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022701_MSG0005
rows.name:
I just hope, from the bottom of my
heart, that the products I designed
will be of some use to you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022701_MSG0006
rows.name:
If you leave through the west gate and follow the
trail to the northwest, you'll come across the Biahno
Grassland base camp, where BLADEs can take shelter.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022701_MSG0007
rows.name:
If you continue past that and go through the Green
Threshold, you'll find yourself on the thickly
forested continent known as Nightglow Forest.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022701_MSG0008
rows.name:
The terrain within Nightglow Forest is
extremely complex, so I've heard that
lots of BLADEs have gotten lost there.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022701_MSG0009
rows.name:
If you have business in Nightglow
Forest, please be careful![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022701_MSG0014
rows.name:
NLA's production system isn't able to
build Dolls as quickly as we'd like.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022701_MSG0015
rows.name:
So we aren't able to furnish Dolls to
new BLADE recruits like yourself.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022701_MSG0016
rows.name:
As a result, we've established a system
that restricts Doll ownership only to those
who've earned a Doll pilot's license.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022701_MSG0017
rows.name:
But I'm confident that with a lot of research and
hard work, one day we'll be able to mass-produce
Dolls here on Mira. So please bear with us.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022701_MSG0021
rows.name:
I've been briefed about the
"Goetia" xenoform that was
encountered in Nightglow Forest.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022701_MSG0022
rows.name:
Apparently she attacked our BLADEs
with some sort of energy weapon.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022701_MSG0023
rows.name:
None of the equipment we've developed is
able to withstand an attack like that.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022701_MSG0024
rows.name:
We need to design some new equipment
with special energy-beam-resistant
coatings as soon as possible![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022701_MSG0025
rows.name:
We researchers will do all that we can
here. But you can contribute by gathering
as many new schematics as you can find.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022701_MSG0030
rows.name:
Needless to say, a Doll's incredible
mobility is its most potent weapon.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022701_MSG0031
rows.name:
But the destructive power of
the weaponry mounted on Dolls
should not be underestimated.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022701_MSG0032
rows.name:
For the generators that power Dolls
also facilitate a variety of
high-firepower weapons systems.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022701_MSG0033
rows.name:
I hear there are some Overeds so
tough they can't even be scratched
with conventional weapons.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022701_MSG0034
rows.name:
However, the weaponry available to Dolls
can punch right through their armor.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022701_MSG0039
rows.name:
As laboratory researchers, we
rarely have the opportunity to
see Growth machinery in motion.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022701_MSG0040
rows.name:
During the attack, it was quite exciting
to be able to see the invading Growth
war machines over our monitors![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022701_MSG0041
rows.name:
They were so powerful, and so mobile! With
tech like that, it's no wonder they were
able to obliterate Earth so easily.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022701_MSG0042
rows.name:
Now I understand why the developers
at MEREDES & Co. were so excited to
reverse-engineer their weaponry.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022701_MSG0047
rows.name:
They say the machine Lao stole was still
under development, but it already seems to
possess an impressive amount of power.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022701_MSG0048
rows.name:
All of us engineers at the arms manufacturers
would love to get a look at the tech behind
the Ares model on which it's based.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022701_MSG0049
rows.name:
We've petitioned BLADE HQ to provide
us the info, but so far, no dice.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022701_MSG0050
rows.name:
They've turned down
every single request.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022701_MSG0051
rows.name:
There must be something about the machine on
which it's based that makes it different from
all the other weapons BLADE possesses.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022701_MSG1001
rows.name:
Someone left a stuffed lobster doll
on the road that runs along the wall
outside the Arms test hangar.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022701_MSG1002
rows.name:
What were they thinking? Why
would someone leave a stuffed
toy in a place like that?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022701_MSG2001
rows.name:
Lyvia is a really sweet person. She
always listens so intently when I'm
telling one of my boring stories.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022701_MSG2002
rows.name:
I can't really fall in love with her,
since I'm not exactly wired that way...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022701_MSG2003
rows.name:
But if we could become friends,
I'd really like that.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022701_MSG3001
rows.name:
Apparently a Companion named Justin was
linked to the Definias, and also giving
weapons and funds to a bunch of criminals.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022701_MSG3002
rows.name:
A lot of strange things have happened
since we arrived on this planet.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022701_MSG3003
rows.name:
It makes me wonder if he was the
one directing some of those
situations from behind the scenes.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022701_MSG3004
rows.name:
But I guess we'll never
know the truth now.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022701_MSG3005
rows.name:
At least we found him. We owe a big
debt of gratitude to the BLADE who
figured it out and stopped him.[ST:wait ]
